markets.no_sub_title: Triple Double
markets.rules_primary: If the play by play or color commentator(s) says Triple Double as part of New York vs Los Angeles C Professional Basketball Game, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Video of the New York vs Los Angeles C Professional Basketball Game will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, transcripts of the New York vs Los Angeles C Professional Basketball Game will be used according to the news publications listed in the contract. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. Please see full rules for more details. Commentary will count once tip off has occurred and end once the game has concluded. Should the game go into overtime, the commentary will continue to count until the game has ended. If the final play is in review, commentary will end following the referee decision. For the purpose of this market, previous recordings aired during this event will count. Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements with the announcers will not. For the purpose of this market, this market will resolve based on the national broadcast. If it is not nationally televised the home team local broadcast will be used.
